summary: The Assistant received a full script from the Director and requested clarification on which specific text excerpt to use for prompt generation. Two examples were provided: "CAGE EXT. DESERT – DAWN..." and "EXT. CITY GATE – SKY ABOVE...". The prompt will be a 2x2 grid prompt, designed for PixVerse, and will focus on cinematography and emotional beats, awaiting the Director's selection.
